content: Mi ha detto che era ricca.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:She told me she used to be rich
eng:She told me she was rich
eng:She told me she was wealthy
eng:She told me that she used to be rich
eng:She told me that she was rich
eng:She told me that she was wealthy
